title: Ranchi University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Ranchi University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Ranchi University Result 2026 declared for BA/BCom/BSc (VOC) Semester 1 Examination 2024 and BA/BCom (General) Semester 2 Examination 2024 on the official website - ranchiuniversity.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Ranchi University result.

content.text: Ranchi University has released the Ranchi University Result 2026 press notices for Bachelor of Arts/Commerce/Science (VOC) Semester 1 Examination 2024 and Bachelor of Arts/Commerce (General) Semester 2 Examination 2024. These undergraduate CBCS results for the 2023–2026 and related batches have been announced through official press releases available online. Ranchi University Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - ranchiuniversity.ac.in.

Students who appeared in the BA/BCom/BSc (VOC) Sem 1 and BA/BCom (Gen) Sem 2 exams can check their result status by referring to the press release notices and then using their roll number on the university result/college notice systems, as applicable. After checking their marks and pass/fail status, they should verify all details and contact their college or the university examination branch if any discrepancy is noticed.

Ranchi University has issued separate press releases summarizing the declaration of results for UG CBCS Semester 1 (VOC) and Semester 2 (General) for the 2024 examination cycle. These notices generally include information about result declaration, overall statistics and instructions for students regarding marksheets and further processes.

Ranchi University has uploaded the official press release PDFs for UG Semester 1 (VOC) and Semester 2 (General) results in the student notice section. From there, candidates can open and read the notices and follow any given instructions for checking detailed results through colleges or other linked systems.

Press Release of Bachelor of Arts/Com. (GEN) Semester 2 Examination 2024
All Ranchi University Student Notices and Result Updates

sections.heading: How to Check Download University Result 2026

content.text: Use the steps below to check your Ranchi University UG Result 2026 based on the press releases:

items: Click on the relevant press release: Press Release of Bachelor of Arts/Com./Sci. (VOC) Semester 1 Examination 2024 Press Release of Bachelor of Arts/Com. (GEN) Semester 2 Examination 2024
Press Release of Bachelor of Arts/Com./Sci. (VOC) Semester 1 Examination 2024
Press Release of Bachelor of Arts/Com. (GEN) Semester 2 Examination 2024
Download and open the PDF by clicking on View Result.
Read the notice for details on result declaration, coverage (subjects/colleges) and how to obtain individual marksheets or check detailed results.
If a separate result link or instruction is provided (such as checking through college notice boards or online result entry), follow that process using your roll number/enrolment number.
Once you obtain your detailed marks, verify subject wise scores, total marks and pass/backlog status and keep a printed copy for your records.
